pageDescription: Manage local resources, versions, and indexing status.
tableSectionDescription: Review resource status, version history, and deletion actions in one place.
searchInputPlaceholder: Filter by name, type, or status
resourceDetailDescription: Select a resource to inspect versions, status, and actions.
selectedResourceDescription: Review the selected resource and jump back into chat from here.
selectedResourceEmptyDescription: Adjust the search term or upload another resource.
selectedBandDescription: Review status and the highest-frequency actions for the current resource.
selectedBandEmptyDescription: Choose one resource from the list above first.
dropzoneTitle: Drop resources here, or choose files
dropzoneHint: Supports txt, md, pdf, docx, and common image formats.
dropzoneActiveHint: Release to add files to the upload queue.
dropzoneRejectHint: Only txt, md, pdf, docx, and common image formats are supported.
uploadHint: Supports txt, md, pdf, docx, and common image formats.
processingInlineHint: The backend is processing resources. Status refreshes automatically.
versionHistoryDescription: Review previous resource versions and their processing states.
previewDescription: Review resource summary, content preview, and next actions.
previewPdfDescription: PDF previews open in a new browser tab.
previewUnsupportedTitle: Inline preview is not available for this file type
previewUnsupportedDescription: Open the original file or download it for local viewing.
previewProcessingDescription: This resource is still processing and will be previewable when ready.
previewFailedDescription: Try again later or open the original file directly.
previewTooLargeDescription: The file is too large for inline preview. Open the original file instead.
versionEmptyDescription: This resource does not have any historical versions to show.
deleteDialogDescription: The resource {{name}} will be removed permanently. This action cannot be undone.
emptyOnboardingDescription: After upload, the file enters the processing queue automatically. Once it is ready, you can cite it from Chat.
emptyOnboardingStepTwo: 2. Go back to Chat and ask one specific question
emptyReadonlyDescription: This account can view resources but cannot upload them. Ask an admin to add new material.
processingHint: The backend is processing this resource. Status refreshes automatically.
